codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/dnd5e/concentration'
params = {
    'clientId': 'foundry-testing-r6bXhB7k9cXa3cif',
    'actorUuid': 'Actor.4zp7DW9DaguOqWcZ'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': '702fc3316ac88039ff83024cf3d44cb4'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
